name: Adult Telegram Delivery Bot
description: Heroku-ready Telegram bot with task posting, MongoDB storage, force subscription, access limits, referrals, userbot control, and broadcasting.

ADMIN_ID.description: Telegram numeric admin ID. Multiple IDs may be comma-separated. ADMIN_IDS, OWNER_ID, and OWNER_IDS are also supported.

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB runtime connection URI. DATABASE_URL is also accepted only when it contains a mongodb:// or mongodb+srv:// URI.

LEGACY_DATABASE_URL.description: Optional old PostgreSQL URL used only to import registered users into MongoDB for broadcasts.

API_ID.description: Optional fallback Telegram API ID. It can also be entered from /admin Userbot Management.

API_HASH.description: Optional fallback Telegram API hash. It can also be entered from /admin Userbot Management.
